_meta.description: OpKit Registry - Maps TUPs to their associated OpKits (production support bundles)
notes: OpKits scaffold deliverable creation: Reference Models, Templates, Checklists, Graded Examples
Each TUP may have one or more associated OpKits
OpKits stored in ops_model_v10_dump/ and will be migrated to opkits/ directory
Navigation: Given any TUP code, Claude can locate its OpKit(s)

production.description: For repeatedly created deliverables across multiple Trades
production.example: Strategic Thesis OpKit, Market Landscape Map OpKit

foundation.example: Documentation Standards OpKit, Protocol Creation OpKit

opkits.name: Thesis Structure Checklist
opkits.description: Decision-forcing checklist: 16 required fields across ICP (3), Positioning (3), Product (3), Distribution (2), Finance (2), Kill Criteria (2)

components.downstream_map: ops_model_v10_dump/1205_m0_thesis_downstream.json - shows which clusters consume which thesis fields

opkits.notes: Bootstrap thesis.json fills most fields but scattered. This OpKit provides single unified checklist.

opkits.name: Computational PMF Observer
opkits.description: Composite state estimator: 10 signals → weighted score → PMF assessment (No PMF/Early/Achieved/Strong)

components.signals: 10 PMF signals (Sean Ellis >40%, Retention M2 >40%, Organic >30%, NPS >50, CAC trend, Referral >10%, Explanation <30s, Price sensitivity, Inbound, Time to value <7d)
components.weights: Sean Ellis 25%, Retention 20%, Organic 15%, NPS 15%, CAC Trend 10%, Referral 5%
components.diagnostic_patterns: 5 fault-tree patterns for diagnosing PMF failures

opkits.notes: This is an Observer, not traditional OpKit, but serves similar scaffolding function for PMF assessment

opkits.name: Anti-Goals Boundary Conditions
opkits.description: 8 constraints defining what IonWave is NOT, with specific temptation triggers

components.constraints: 8 anti-goals (e.g., no new flavor until $50K MRR)
components.temptation_triggers: Parameters defining when rule can be broken

opkits.notes: Boundary conditions that define solution space

opkits.name: Bifurcation Points Controller Stack
opkits.description: Controller stack: Early Warning (80% of bifurcation) → Bifurcation (investigate/intervene) → Kill (stop business)

components.severity_levels: Early Warning, Bifurcation, Kill - three severity levels per metric
components.reactive_protocols: Defined responses when metrics cross thresholds

opkits.notes: This is a Controller, not traditional OpKit, but provides scaffolding for monitoring

opkits.name: Competitive Intelligence Protocol
opkits.description: Complete CI workflow with 7 frameworks and graded examples

components.frameworks: Porter's Five Forces, Market Landscape Map, SWOT, Competitor Analysis, etc.
components.graded_examples: Real examples at A/B/C quality levels

opkits.decision: REC-007 (Danilo canon cluster, but Bootstrap CI protocol is superior)
opkits.notes: Bootstrap-created protocol is production-ready and contains worked examples

opkits.name: ICP Analysis Framework
opkits.description: ICP definition framework with segmentation, archetypes, psychographics
opkits.notes: Bootstrap-created framework, validated through persona dialogue

opkits.name: Voice of Customer Collection Protocol
opkits.description: Mom Test-based interview protocol with playbook, script, questions
opkits.notes: Mom Test methodology applied, 31 LMNT quotes at saturation

Google Optimize replaced with current Shopify-native tool landscape.

Key innovations: 8 funnel architectures (including LP+VSL Hybrid), conversion equation (Desire − Friction − Anxiety), comprehensive FTC/DSHEA/Prop 65 compliance framework, subscription-first checkout with Shop Pay priority, sensitivity analysis for funnel economics, modular LP design for creative fatigue, server-side tracking requirement, Emma Relief as cautionary reference (replicate funnel structure, avoid aggressive practices). 3 critical compliance upgrades: FTC negative option rule, Prop 65 CoA testing, click-to-cancel rule.

Novel contributions: bifurcation-linked scenario planning, kill criteria integrated sensitivity analysis, phase-gated financial reporting.

opkits.name: D2C Seed Fundraising Framework
opkits.description: Complete fundraising strategy, pitch deck framework, investor relations, term negotiation, diligence, and exit planning for D2C brands raising $30K-500K seed capital

components.fundraising_strategy: data/m4/fundraising_strategy.md — 2026 D2C climate, raise/bootstrap decision, raise sizing, investor targeting, pitch strategy, 7-week validation sprint, backup funding plans
components.pitch_deck: data/m4/pitch_deck_framework.md — 15-slide framework, slide-by-slide rationale, IonWave deck analysis (A-grade), customization guide, visual design principles, Trade-as-pitch alternative
components.investor_relations: data/m4/investor_relations.md — 7-stage CRM pipeline, investor types, outreach templates, meeting prep, monthly updates, relationship management, FAQ
components.term_negotiation: data/m4/term_sheet_and_negotiation.md — SAFE structure, terms comparison, negotiation playbook, red flags, legal process, closing mechanics
components.diligence_and_exit: data/m4/diligence_and_exit.md — due diligence Q&A, data room setup, exit scenarios (PE/strategic/operator/distributions), exit prep, timeline
components.instructions: Complete 5-file system with graded IonWave example (8.3/10)
components.graded_example: IonWave Trade #84 (pre-revenue SAFE, $30-50K at $250-500K cap, 8.3/10 quality)

opkits.notes: 9 Danilo tabs (201-209, all high quality with directly usable content: Investor FAQ, 15-slide pitch deck EXCELLENT, Backup Funding Plan, CRM 7-stage framework, Investor Update Template, Negotiation Playbook, Term Sheet Guide, Exit Preparation, Diligence Answers) consolidated into 5 content files + dialogue + self-grade. Novel concept: Trade-as-pitch (investors interact with Claude vs static deck) is experimental (D-grade) — recommend testing with 3-5 friendly investors. 7-week validation sprint as de-risking pitch. Grading: 8.3/10 (conservative adjustment for pre-traction status, all recommendations theory-based pending real investor feedback). Key finding: 2026 D2C fundraising is selective (down 97% from 2021 peak), SAFEs dominate (92% of pre-priced rounds), $30-50K micro-seed targets angels/F&F not VCs.

opkits.name: Mineral-Based Supplement Formulation Framework
opkits.description: Complete 6-phase framework for formulating ANY mineral-based supplement with scientific rigor, regulatory compliance, and honest confidence grading — electrolytes, trace minerals, alkalizing blends, marine-derived products

components.instructions: 6 phases from Research & Benchmarking → Specification Development → Scientific Substantiation → Product Development → Validation & Testing → Registration & Launch
components.grading_rubric: 5 dimensions (Evidence Coverage, Confidence Honesty, Upgrade Path Quality, Actionability, OpKit Reusability) × 1-10 scale
components.scaffold: Research templates (mineral science matrix, competitor formulation map, bioavailability hierarchy), specification templates (mineral profile with confidence grades, quality markers, CoA requirements), substantiation templates (claims mapping, evidence hierarchy, safety assessment), development templates (taste testing protocol, stability testing, cost breakdown), validation checklist
components.graded_example: IonWave Trade #84 (marine plasma electrolyte, pre-launch, 8.5/10 quality)

opkits.notes: 15 Danilo tabs → 5 content files (formulation_specification 323 lines, scientific_substantiation 628 lines, product_development 577 lines, usage_protocols_and_stacking 557 lines, dialogue_summary 162 lines). Green-field build with 2026 industry research (5 web searches: marine plasma bioavailability, ocean vs synthetic electrolytes, Quinton clinical research, FDA DSHEA claims, magnesium forms). 6-round dialogue to saturation (Formulation Scientist, Skeptical Nutritionist, Regulatory/Claims Auditor) with 22 upgrades. Key innovations: confidence honesty system (A/B/C/D grades + [VOID — requires CoA] for all supplier-dependent data), ocean-sourced ionic minerals vs synthetic comparison (bioavailability 66-90%+ vs 9-105% variable), 78-trace-mineral substantiation reality check (only 20 elements biochemically required, rest marketing claim), FDA/FTC compliance integration from M7, M6 supply chain integration (CoA requirements, heavy metal limits, restock formula). Quality 8.5/10: exceptional confidence honesty (9.5/10), strong evidence for core electrolytes (Na/K/Mg A-grade), honest about gaps (ocean superiority lacks RCT, trace mineral efficacy unproven). Supplier-dependent: ALL exact trace mineral amounts require Week 1-2 CoA validation. Pre-launch blockers: taste testing (Week 3-4), stability testing (Month 3-6), bioavailability RCT (Q3 2026, $50-150K). **BCL-1 now 4/4 complete (100%)** — M5/M6/M7/M8 all done.

opkits.name: Supplement Supply Chain Design & Management
opkits.description: 8-step framework for building compliant, scalable supplement supply chains: supplier research, evaluation scorecard, outreach templates, COA requirements, restock formula, backup plan. Applicable to any supplement brand (capsule/powder/liquid, D2C/B2B/wholesale).

components.instructions: 8 steps from requirements definition → supplier selection → contract qualification → COA setup → restock framework → backup protocols
components.scorecard: 7-criteria supplier evaluation (Quality 30%, MOQ 20%, Lead Time 15%, Unit Economics 15%, Transparency 10%, Packaging 5%, Exclusivity 5%)
components.coa_template: FDA-compliant Certificate of Analysis with Prop 65 heavy metal limits, microbial testing, batch traceability
components.restock_formula: Reorder Point = (Daily Sales × Lead Time) + Safety Stock; tiered safety stock (21 days Phase 1, 14 days Phase 2+)

opkits.grading_rubric: 5 dimensions (Supplier Vetting, Quality Control, Inventory Planning, Supplier Backup, Documentation) × A-F scale = overall grade
opkits.notes: IonWave example is marine plasma-specific (Biocean/Quinton/Actimar suppliers), but OpKit method generalizes. Pre-launch quality (8.4/10) due to pending supplier outreach — will upgrade to 9-10/10 after Week 1-2 execution.

opkits.name: Supplement Regulatory Compliance
components: 6-step pre-launch framework (FDA status, DSHEA label, cGMP verification, FTC marketing audit, compliance systems, attorney review)
4 compliance checklists (pre-launch marketing audit, compliance budget, 12-month calendar, claims library)

m7.note: MIGRATED — 11 Danilo tabs → 2 comprehensive files (FDA/FTC framework 41 pages + claims guidance/IonWave audit 39 pages). Embedded expert dialogue (Regulatory Attorney + FTC Enforcement Officer). Key: IonWave M11 VSL audit flagged 7 violations ($420K-$2M FTC exposure), P0 corrections (4 hours, $0 cost). 2026 updates: FDA disclaimer once per label, FTC consumer review enforcement +340%.

opkits.name: Brand Identity Workshop Kit (D2C Supplements)

components.instructions: 14-step brand identity workshop protocol (positioning → voice → packaging → naming → messaging → visual identity → research → dialogue → self-grade)
components.grading_rubric: 5 dimensions (Positioning Clarity, Voice Consistency, Visual Cohesion, Packaging Compliance, Storytelling Strength) × 1-10 scale
components.scaffold: 4 templates (Positioning Canvas, Voice Principles Worksheet, Packaging Compliance Checklist, Industry Perspectives Framework)
components.graded_example: IonWave Trade #84 (7.8/10) — marine plasma supplement brand with 7 content files

opkits.notes: 16 Danilo tabs → 7 content files + dialogue summary + OpKit. Key: 3-phase brand evolution model (Challenger → Category Ownership → Market Leader), Informed Guide voice archetype, FDA-compliant packaging system, sachet/box messaging split for positioning flexibility, 6 CRITICAL blockers flagged (logo, photography, CoA, Prop 65, trademark, domain). Quality 7.8/10 reflects strong strategic foundation with typical pre-launch execution gaps.

components: grading rubric (7 criteria: FTC compliance, script structure, hook strength, testing rigor, production quality, financial modeling, iteration system)

Key: VSL-as-Trade framework (testable thesis, kill criteria, portfolio strategy). FTC compliance rigorously documented (fictional testimonials flagged, substantiation gaps explicit). Winner rate adjusted to industry standard (10-20%).

Key: Tiered scaling rates by conversion volume (20%/30%/40-50%), post-iOS 14.5 attribution stack (Pixel+CAPI, EMQ >7.0), channel profitability P&L model (contribution margin > CAC), 4-phase diversification (<50% single platform by Month 12), creative fatigue timelines (2-4 weeks), tracking validation checkpoints (prevents $10K+ waste).

opkits.name: D2C Hiring Framework
opkits.description: Complete hiring system for bootstrapped/lean D2C brands: when/who/how to hire, compensation framework, PM competence assessment, sourcing → onboarding → firing workflow

components.hiring_strategy: data/m31/hiring_strategy.md — when to hire, team evolution, PM competence framework, operator vs employee distinction
components.hiring_processes: data/m31/hiring_processes.md — sourcing channels, 3-stage interview, evaluation, onboarding, firing guide
components.job_specifications: data/m31/job_specifications.md — 11 role specs (operator, PMs, CEO/CFO/VP) phase-gated by MRR
components.compensation_framework: data/m31/compensation_framework.md — equity vs cash, market data, dilution waterfall, negotiation frameworks
components.industry_perspectives: data/m31/industry_perspectives.md — 2026 D2C hiring landscape, remote trends, contractor marketplace
components.dialogue_summary: data/m31/dialogue_summary.md — 6-round expert persona dialogue (HR Professional, Startup Recruiter, D2C Founder), saturation achieved
components.instructions: data/opkits/OK-M31-001_Hiring_Framework.md — 14-step how-to for any D2C brand

opkits.notes: 31 Danilo tabs (640-670, 617 rows) consolidated into 5 content files + dialogue + self-grade + OpKit. Green-field build (no Bootstrap sources, archived File 16). 6 dialogue rounds with 6 upgrades: PM Competence conversational embedding, pipeline-building timeline (4-6 weeks early), dilution waterfall math, firing timing (avoid Fridays + holidays), community engagement sourcing playbook (lurk → contribute → DM), hybrid creative sprint model. Novel innovations: PM Competence Framework (18-question scorecard, score >60 before ad spend), 3-4 PM maximum constraint, operator equity model (10-25% vs employee 0.5-2%), pipeline-building hiring (post roles 4-6 weeks early), remote-first with creative sprints (3-5 days every 6-8 weeks). Key finding: Contractor marketplace strong (Upwork 18M freelancers, $39/hr avg), remote work prioritized by 85% of workers (55% prefer hybrid), AI skills demand doubled YoY.

opkits.name: Execution Planning Framework
opkits.description: Universal 12-step framework for building phase-gated execution plans (30/90/365-day) + operating rhythms (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly) that drive accountability, prevent premature scaling, and enable crisis resilience. Applicable to any D2C Trade, adaptable to B2B/SaaS.

components.30_90_365_plans: data/m35/30_90_365_day_plans.md — Task-level 30 days, directional 31-90, strategic 91-365 with rolling lock protocol
components.operating_rhythms: data/m35/operating_rhythms_and_loops.md — Daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly loops with Amazon WBR-inspired choreography (feed-forward design)
components.phase_checklists: data/m35/phase_checklists_and_sops.md — Objective LAUNCH → PMF → SCALE gates (First Round PMF framework) + 5 core SOPs
components.detailed_timelines: data/m35/detailed_execution_timelines.md — 6-month operating plan, Week 1-12 narrative, Week 1 Day-by-Day (hour-by-hour), Gantt chart
components.industry_perspectives: data/m35/industry_perspectives.md — Research-backed D2C execution planning perspectives (Amazon WBR, First Round PMF, Mutiny/HashiCorp rhythms)
components.instructions: data/m35/opkit_execution_planning.md — 12-step how-to with scaffolds and grading rubric

opkits.notes: 25 Danilo tabs (773-797, 801) → 5 core content files + industry perspectives + dialogue + quality assessment + OpKit. Green-field build (no Bootstrap sources). All industry research A-grade (Amazon WBR, First Round PMF, D2C 2026 trends). IonWave adaptation C/D-grade (pre-launch). 6 dialogue rounds with 8 upgrades: CAC phasing (Week 1-2 test, Week 3-4 learning, Month 2+ efficiency), supplier pre-work (Week -2 CoA requests), MBR duration scaling (60 min solo, 90 min team, Weekly Deep Dive Month 10+), dual LTV gate (LTV:CAC >3.0 + Month 3 retention >60%), 3PL timing (quotes Month 3, trigger 150/month OR founder time >10 hrs/week), kill discipline (WBR 'Kills & Pivots' forcing weekly decisions), crisis mode (circuit breaker pauses loops when existential blocker hits), hour-by-hour Week 1 granularity. 2 unresolved gaps (solo founder burnout, market saturation). Novel innovations: choreography framework (loops feed forward), phase-gated strictness (LTV:CAC >3.0, NPS >40%, churn <15% objective gates), crisis mode protocol, hour-by-hour Week 1 Day-by-Day, kill discipline forcing function, pre-launch supplier work, dual LTV gate protection.

m36.note: MIGRATED — 43 Danilo tabs → 6 output files. Company-as-a-system is the spine. Risk register complete with L×I scoring. CM authority model in two variants. Phase 1/Phase 2 monitoring architecture. 5 dialogue rounds, 7 upgrades.

opkits.name: Theoretical Operations Framework
opkits.description: Generalizable framework for grounding Trade operations in deep theoretical foundations (Christopher Alexander pattern language, David Bohm implicate/explicate order, Giulio Tononi IIT, W. Ross Ashby requisite variety). Enables Trades to move beyond ad-hoc tactics toward principle-driven operations.

components.theoretical_foundations: 4 frameworks (Alexander 15 Properties, Bohm Implicate/Explicate, Tononi IIT/mutual information, Ashby requisite variety)
components.operational_protocols: 6 protocols (75 Questions, 5-6 Bullets, 3-Gate Review, Virtual Twin, Verification Strategy, Pattern Language Application)
components.protocol_template: 5-step protocol generation process (identify problem → apply theoretical lens → design protocol → test → extract as pattern)
components.pattern_structure: Alexander format (Name, Context, Problem, Forces, Solution, Consequences, Related Patterns)
components.adaptation_guide: 5 industry adaptations (D2C e-commerce, B2B SaaS, services/consulting, content/media, deep tech/hardware)
components.instructions: data/m39/opkit_theoretical_operations.md — complete framework with reusability guide

opkits.notes: First purely meta-level OpKit (BCL-0). 14 content tabs + Danilo vision → 6 content files (theoretical_foundations 540 lines, operational_protocols 640 lines, advisor_strategy 420 lines, textbook_ma_strategy 370 lines, love_as_mutual_information 320 lines, workshop_summary 160 lines) + dialogue summary (7 rounds, 12 upgrades, saturation achieved) + OpKit. Novel concepts: requisite variety via TUP decomposition (41 TUPs match 41 market dimensions), love as mutual information (Tononi IIT applied to teams), aliveness scoring (Alexander's 15 properties as Trade quality metric), implicate/explicate ratio (track unfoldment: 31/41 TUPs = 76%). Evidence quality: Theory B-grade (well-sourced: Alexander, Bohm, Tononi, Ashby), operational translations C/D-grade (logical but unvalidated). Requires cross-Trade testing to upgrade from Experimental → Proven (3+ Trades) → Canonical (10+ Trades + published validation). Key blocker: All protocols untested, require deployment + outcome measurement to validate.
